title: John Greene
compiled_truth: John Greene is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-25), John Greene sent 13 and received 127 emails, totalling 140 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (13), [Sheila Glover](people/sheila-glover) (8), [Gary Hickerson](people/gary-hickerson) (5), [Laurel Adams](people/laurel-adams) (5), [Paul Simons](people/paul-simons) (4).
